name: Raven x Rogue 11⁄2 date
description:
It's not quite "double date", eh?
Hello fellow students! Today we introduce the new "SECRET VALENTINE" event! Have you heard about "secret Santa"? Well this is the same thing but with DATES instead of gifts! If you're single (or have a consenting partner), fill up the short form on our website, and get a date on the 14th of February!
P.s. the event is wholly organised by students, and all profits are directed to charity!
- be kind, Starfire - head of event organisation.

[Charles university] - slice-of-life Alt universe where fictional characters attending college. (Partially Inspired by Gotham high and X-Men evolution).

Also check separate Raven and Rogue.
creator: Mycop
